TextENGNew: ``Wh-Who the hell are you people?!``
``Step aside.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1002. Who's in charge here?``
Several cars pulled up one after another, and men who were clearly not Okinomiya station detectives emerged from them.
A slender man in a crisply tailored suit -- despite the sweltering heat -- brushed past the protesting Kumagai and approached Ooishi.
``...Well, well, if it isn't.@k@vS09/11/170700523. Long time no see, Ootaka-kun from the prefectural police.``
changeReason: Different locations referenced: old mentions 'prefectural headquarters', new mentions 'prefectural police'.

TextENGNew: ``Mind your tongue.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1004. I've long since outranked the point where you can address me as '-kun.'``

``Something I can help you with, Ootaka-kun?@k@vS09/11/170700525. I'm rather occupied at the moment.@k@vS09/11/170700526. Don't tell me the prefectural police intend to take over this scene?@k@vS09/11/170700527. On whose authority?!``
changeReason: New translation adds location detail not in original: 'prefectural police'.

TextENGNew: ``Mine, Ooishi-kun!``
``Ch-Chief...?!``

``I've been briefed by Takasugi-kun.@k@vS09/00/syocho17003. Including the part about you being the one who planted the seeds for this.@k@vS09/00/syocho17004. Stand down. The tactical unit is taking over!``
``The tactical unit? ...Ootaka-kun, you're not seriously planning to storm the building?!``

``I'm well aware of the danger.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1006. But at this rate, you're getting nowhere -- just wasting time.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1007. You've been sitting on this for too long.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1008. We're here to clean up after you.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1009. Hand over command and fall back.``
With both the chief and a man from the prefectural headquarters bearing down on him, Ooishi had no choice but to yield.
changeReason: Narrative perspective shift from first-person to third-person.

TextENGNew: ``Wh-... Ooishi-san, who the hell is that guy...?!``
``That's Ootaka-kun.@k@vS09/11/170700531. Nfu fu, back in the day, he used to strut around even though he was absolutely terrible at mahjong, so I crushed him good.``
``Or maybe he's still holding a grudge from the time I caught him off guard in that kendo tournament and knocked him flat.``
Without needing to hear any more, it was easy to imagine that the two of them were like cats and dogs.
changeReason: Narrative perspective shift: old uses first-person 'we'; new correctly uses third-person matching Japanese.

TextENGNew: ``Bring me up to speed on the current situation, Ooishi-kun.``

``Are you seriously planning to storm the building?@k@vS09/11/170700534. We're on the verge of resolving this peacefully with sleeping pills.@k@vS09/11/170700535. You're going to throw all of that away?!``
``The assault will be carried out by a specialist unit from the prefectural police.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1012. Your people will serve as backup.``

``...Chief.@k@vS09/11/170700537. You understand the situation, don't you?@k@vS09/11/170700538. That classroom is essentially a giant bomb right now!@k@vS09/11/170700539. But the most dangerous bomb isn't the classroom itself.``

``It's the suspect -- Ryuugu Rena herself!!@k@vS09/11/170700541. We've finally calmed her down and devised a plan to resolve this peacefully, and we were just about to execute it.@k@vS09/11/170700542. We have less than ten minutes, it's true.@k@vS09/11/170700543. But I will make this work!!``

``I'll handle the negotiations myself.@k@vS09/11/170700545. If I fail, I'm the one who gets blown to pieces.@k@vS09/11/170700546. You lot can stand back and watch, and if it goes wrong, you can say 'serves him right'!``
``Ooishi-kun,@k@vS09/00/syocho17006. the special unit from the prefectural police department isn't just any old unit.@k@vS09/00/syocho17007. You've heard about the Second Company, haven't you?``
``What's that, Ooishi-san?@k@vS09/19/173100174. Is this ``Second Company`` that well known?``

``Do you remember, about five years ago, when the JRA hijacked that airplane? Flight 472?@k@vS09/11/170700548. I've heard that special counter-terrorist units were put together in Tokyo and Osaka after that incident.@k@vS09/11/170700549. So they really do exist...``
``B-But why would a special unit from Osaka be here?``
Ootaka smiled proudly.
``We just happened to be holding a training session with your prefectural police unit.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1014. We requested their help.``
``Na ha ha... you haven't changed, have you?@k@vS09/11/170700551. ...You have a bad tendency to escalate matters quickly.``
The Company members exited the vehicles one after another and took position.
They didn't move like policemen...
``Ootaka-kun!@k@vS09/11/170700553. Are you really going to have a gunfight here?@k@vS09/11/170700554. One shot is all it'll take to trigger an explosion!``

``Don't worry.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1016. They won't use firearms.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1017. They're using riot shields and riot guns.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1018. These guns send out tear gas at high pressures.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1019. There will be no issue with explosions.``
``......Wow, I've never heard of such convenient water guns.@k@vS09/11/170700556. By the way, can that toy reach the classroom from across the schoolyard?``
``You don't need to worry about that.@k@vS09/00/VT3_ootaka1021. You just move over and let us do our job.``
As I lifted my arms exaggeratedly, one elbow accidentally touched the car horn, which honked.
.........Of course, I did it on purpose...
``Are you trying to get Keiichi Maebara's attention?``
``Of course.@k@vS09/11/170700558. I just hope he heard it...``
``What are you going to tell him now?``
``They're probably thinking about breaking one of the windows with a grenade and then shooting tear gas into the room.
...They have no idea how serious Rena Ryuugu is.@k@vS09/11/170700561. Deadly serious.@k@vS09/11/170700562. Even the noise of a window breaking could drive her over the edge...!``
``Are you saying the special unit can't suppress her?``

``Of course not!@k@vS09/11/170700564. That's why we've been so careful!@k@vS09/11/170700565. Rena Ryuugu has been intending to kill herself this whole time.@k@vS09/11/170700566. A raid doesn't work on people who don't care about dying!@k@vS09/11/170700567. ...We only have Maebara-san now!``
``O-Ooishi-san!@k@vS09/19/173100180. Here he is!``
``Hello, this is Ooishi.@k@vS09/11/170700569. If you can hear me, please cough.``
``Cough, cough...``
``This is an emergency.@k@vS09/11/170700571. Please listen.``
``I have a feeling it's not good news...``

``Unfortunately, you're right.@k@vS09/11/170700572. The prefectural police are getting involved. They're going to ruin everything we've worked for so far.@k@vS09/11/170700573. There's a special unit about to break in.``
``H-Hey, the only reason I haven't used my pepper spray is because that won't stop her from igniting the gas...@k@vS09/01/170101331. A raid won't work...!``

``The prefectural police don't understand that Ryuugu-san is prepared to die.@k@vS09/11/170700575. They're assuming the lighter is just a threat and that she isn't really going to ignite the gas.@k@vS09/11/170700576. They'll break in within five minutes or so.
Please take the lighter from Rena Ryuugu before they move in!``
``Is that an addition to your order to do something about the time bomb?``
``...Yes, that's right.``

``You've got to be kidding me...@k@vS09/01/170101334. You want me to take the lighter from Rena and do something about the time bomb too, all within five minutes?@k@vS09/01/170101335. ...Come on......``
``You're the only one we can count on...!@k@vS09/11/170700580. I'm begging you...!!!``
``How is it, Satoko?@k@vS09/05/170500246. Can you think of something?``
``.........I just have to check the hallway on the first floor.@k@vS09/04/170400170. To check whether it is there or not.
Knowing Rena-san's patterns, if it was on the first floor, it would be there, and if it was on the second floor, it would be there...``
``I just have to check to see if there is a cord in the hallway on the first floor, right?``

``......It should be there.@k@vS09/04/170400173. .........Tch, if Rena-san was in a normal state of mind, I would know for certain... but with her being like this, I really cannot figure out her thought pattern right now...``
``Okay, I'll do something.@k@vS09/01/170101338. We don't even have time to think about it.@k@vS09/01/170101339. I'll look into those two options myself!``
I don't want another tragedy.
You demons down in Hell, I bet you're just waiting for an amusing ending to unfold while eating some popcorn.
I won't let that happen. I'm going to change everything!!
And then I'm going to make you pick up your popcorn off the floor!!
I spoke to Rena as she continued on with her story about the aliens.
``What is it?@k@vS09/02/170201616. What's the matter, Keiichi-kun?``
``Hey... didn't you hear something just now?``
Rena went quiet and looked around...
Rena had become totally paranoid about everything.
Once she became worried, she couldn't ignore it...
``............Really?@k@vS09/02/170201619. Are you sure, Keiichi-kun?``
``...Yeah.@k@vS09/01/170101343. I'm sure I heard something.``
I knew she'd want to check it herself.
But she really couldn't leave the room for something like that...
So in that case, she'd have to ask me to check for her.
Rena must have been thinking the same thing.
``............Keiichi-kun, can you go check?``
Rena gave me an order with a fake smile on her lips.
Rena watched me go out into the hallway.@k As I did, she spoke to me.
``Don't... make me angry ......okay?``
``Trust me.@k@vS09/01/170101346. I'm your friend.``
``......Yeah. ...I trust you.@k@vS09/02/170201624. I trust you...... so don't betray me, okay...?``
After being freed from Rena, I looked for a cord in a hurry.@k I didn't even have five minutes!
The office probably had more outlets than anywhere else...
I headed for the teacher's office.
Shit, where were the outlets?
Unlike light switches, outlets couldn't always be found near entrances...
Damn it, why did the clock in the teacher's office have to make such a loud ticking noise?
``......Don't worry, Keiichi will find it.``
``Rena-san would... if I were Rena-san...
......if Rena-san was even more mistrusting than usual... where would she set the trap?@k@vS09/04/170400176. A trap expert like myself ought to be able to discern that!!``
``Hmm? What's this...?``
I saw a plug inserted into the unit under the principal's desk, and I also saw a cord extending under the door to the reception room.
There shouldn't have been any reason why a cord had to be extended into that room.
The reception room had an outlet of its own.
I tiptoed over to the reception room... and opened the door.
Squeak...
The door squeaked as I cracked it open a little.
I poked my head inside the reception room.@k I saw the suspicious cord crossing the room and extending under the door to the hallway.
I followed the cord through the reception room.
I opened the door to the hallway... and the cord was extending into the storage closet.
The storage closet was used to hold cleaning chemicals. I could smell them from here.
The cord was extending into there...
I carefully opened the door and turned the light on.
The cord was attached to another extension cord... and there was an alarm clock that didn't belong in there!!!
The time bomb!!!
So all I'd have to do was to unplug the cord!
I picked up the alarm clock.
...It looked like a normal alarm clock.
...Actually, it was a normal alarm clock.
I remembered Kumagai-san calling it a ``kitchen timer``.@k He said it was a bit like an alarm clock.
But this wasn't a bit like an alarm clock, it was an alarm clock...
Wait, didn't alarm clocks use batteries?
This alarm clock was a battery-operated one, too...
I looked at the extension cord...... and there was nothing plugged into it.
What was this extension cord for?@k ...Why was this extending all the way from the teacher's office...?
``S-Satoko?``
``That's the wrong place! You've been tricked!!!``
A black shadow was covering me.
I could feel my body freeze... It was so frozen that I could feel it was about to crack...
I turned around slowly...... and saw someone holding a hatchet above their head.
I dropped the alarm clock.
It made a noise as it hit the ground.
``......Why did you follow the extension cord and why did you have the alarm clock in your hands? ...Why did you?``
All the cells in my body were frozen.@k This was Rena's trap.
Rena was suspicious of everyone, including me...
This whole time, she thought there was someone connected to the people outside...
This was a trap to lure that person out...
Only the people outside knew about the time bomb.
...I was told about the whole thing and so I followed the extension cord and picked up the alarm clock... How stupid of me.
``Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha, I trusted you, Keiichi-kun...@k@|@y@vS09/02/170201627. How could you...``
Rena hit me with the back side of the hatchet earlier.
It was painful, but it didn't kill me.
But this time, she was holding the hatchet the right way.
It wouldn't just crack my forehead.@k It would split my entire head open...!!!
Rena lifted the hatchet mercilessly...
She moved slowly, as if everything was in slow motion... she looked almost divine...
Maybe it really was holy.
I was praying, after all...
Praying?
What was I praying for...?
I was praying for my life......!!!
``Whahhhhh!!!``
It was so sudden, I couldn't tell what happened.
Rika-chan had jumped onto Rena from behind.
I didn't know what kind of weapon Rika-chan used, but Rena started moaning. It clearly hurt.
That brought me back to reality!
I couldn't just watch them!!
I had to get the lighter from Rena!!!
``Whahhh!!!``
``...Don't think you can win with mere force!!!``
Rena knew I was after the lighter. She closed her fingers around it tightly!
Rika-chan was grabbing onto the arm Rena was holding the hatchet in.
I wanted to tell her to run, but thanks to Rika-chan, I could use both of my hands to get at the lighter!!
``Whaahh!!!``
The lighter flew out of Rena's hand.
It hit the hallway wall and dropped down to the floor!
I picked it up.
At the same moment I did, Rena managed to shake off Rika-chan.
...There's our chance!
I turned in Satoko's direction.
``Keiichi-san!!!@k@vS09/04/170400181. I know now, I figured it out!!!``
I heard Satoko screaming from the classroom.
Satoko had figured out where Rena hid the time bomb!!
I wanted to catch Rena, but I didn't have time for that.
I had to do something about the time bomb instead!!
``Keiichi!@k@vS09/05/170500250. Hurry up and go back to Satoko!``
Rika-chan had spread her arms, blocking Rena's path forward.
``What are you doing? Just run!!!``
``.........Keiichi.@k@vS09/05/170500252. This isn't the first time I've done this for you.@k@vS09/05/170500253. Don't you remember?``
``If I'd tried a little harder the previous time... you could have made it.
...So this time, you are going to make it!@k@vS09/05/170500256. Just go!!``
I didn't know what Rika-chan was talking about.
But there was one thing I did know.
Just like Rena and Mion were ready to give up their lives for their friends, and I was willing to give up mine...@k Rika-chan was prepared for that too!!
Therefore, telling Rika-chan to run was like telling her she wasn't my friend!!
And so, I will depend on my friend, Rika-chan!!
``Thank you, Rika-chan!!!``
``Keiichi-san, we are running out of tiiiiiime!!!``
Leaving it to Rika-chan, I dashed for the classroom!!
As soon as Rika heard Keiichi's footsteps reach the classroom door, she sighed in relief.
As she did, Rena's black shadow came ever closer.

``Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!@k@vS09/02/170201630. That's great, that's just great; this isn't a club activity, you know?@k@vS09/02/170201631. You'll be killed for real!! You'll be killed by an angry Rena!!``
``Ahahahahahahahahaha...ha ha...
Hmm...@k@vS09/02/170201634. You're not afraid of me, are you?@k@vS09/02/170201635. You're amazing, Rika-chan.``
Rika grabbed a mop as she ran from the storage closet. She picked it up and held it upside down, like a spear.
Rika's stance told Rena that she was ready to fight.
Rika didn't look like a little girl anymore.
She looked so brave...@k that Rena was even startled by it.
``.........Boy, you really are amazing.@k@vS09/02/170201637. You aren't afraid of being killed at all, huh?``
Rika smiled cynically.
Rika usually never smiled this way.
``Do you really think I would be afraid of death?@k@vS09/05/170500260. I've experienced several hundred deaths up until now. Why should I be afraid of it all of a sudden?``
``You... aren't Rika-chan, are you?@k@vS09/02/170201639. ...You're the one I met that night...@k@vS09/02/170201640. Show yourself, alien...!@k@vS09/02/170201641. Where is the real Rika-chan?``
``The real Rika?@k@vS09/05/170500262. She's right here.@k@|@y@vS09/05/170500263. ...Meep, nipah☆.``

``Ah!!@k@vS09/02/170201643. The way you're looking down on me, that really is like Rika-chan!@k@vS09/02/170201644. ...I get it, Oyashiro-sama is an alien.@k@vS09/02/170201645. The Furude family is descended from him...  and therefore you are a descendant of aliens!!@k@vS09/02/170201646. Ahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!
I'll crack open your head and drag out all the parasites in your brain, ahhhahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahahaha!!!``
Rena raised her hatchet and charged at Rika with a scream!!
``Hyaaaahhhh!!@k@vS09/02/170201649. One swing is all I need to smash your head open!!!!``
Rena looked like a beast charging towards its prey!!!
Rika took a step backwards and lowered her body, preparing to counterattack.
She did that with no hesitation...
``Even a minute is plenty.@k@vS09/05/170500265. I'll play with you. Come on, hatchet girl!``
``Do you not get it, Keiichi-san?@k@vS09/04/170400184. All the hints were already in place this morning!``
``C-Calm down, Satoko!@k@vS09/01/170101358. Explain more slowly so I can understand!@k@vS09/01/170101359. What are you trying to say?``
It's simple if you just remember...!@k Come on, it's quite obvious when you do!
``Hey, something stinks today. Close the windows!``
``Silly, it'll be hotter in here if we close the windows!!``
We had been smelling gasoline coming from outdoors.
There were no forestry service people in the office, so they weren't doing any work today.@k The smell wasn't coming from anything they were doing.
In other words, it was the smell of Rena's gasoline.
Rena hid the gasoline near the classroom. She had it in a plastic container.
You can't smell gasoline that's in a plastic container...
So in other words, she had more gasoline ready than just in the container she used to spread it around the classroom.
Where was the smell coming from?@k ...Was it coming from outside?
Vaporized gasoline is heavier than air.
It sinks.
There was another hint other than that.
``What?!@k@vS09/00/boyB17002. Our ball is missing!@k@vS09/00/boyB17003. You hid it again, didn't you, Houjou?``
``Why would I hide such a stupid thing?@k@vS09/04/170400152. If I was going to hide something, I'd hide something better than that.``
Kids who love to play with their ball never lose it!
It should have been in the same place it always was.
But it was gone!
So that must mean that Rena used it for something!
The gasoline was coming from above.@k A ball was missing...@k So maybe, it was stuffed somewhere...
``Rena-san blocked the drain with the ball and poured gasoline in the drain canal!!@k@vS09/04/170400188. Where?@k@vS09/04/170400189. On the roof of the second floor!!``
The drain canal extended along the roof of the second floor and then came straight down to the ground.
If it was plugged and filled with gasoline... it was like a huge Molotov cocktail that extended from the ground to the roof of the second floor!!
Furthermore, the drain canal ran by the classroom windows!!
If the canal exploded, the classroom would explode too!!
``Therefore!!@k@vS09/01/170101361. The time bomb must be...!!``
``I bet she ran an extension cord out the second floor window... It's on the rooftop!!!``
I picked up a pair of scissors and cut Satoko's bonds.
``By the way, how did Rika-chan free herself from the rope?``
``I apologize for not being thin enough to slip out myself.``
I rubbed Satoko's head.
``Take care of the rest here!@k@vS09/01/170101364. I'm going up to the roof!!``
As I jumped out of the classroom, Satoko stopped me.
``Keiichi-san, here!!``
``What is it?``
Something silver sailed through the air!
I caught it.@k It was a metal bat...!
``...That's Nii-nii's.
Make sure you give it back to me, okay?``
``Sure thing!!@k@vS09/01/170101367. Thanks, Satoko!!!``
The metal bat fit right in my palm. I didn't even feel its weight.@k It really eased my mind!!
The name ``Satoshi`` was written on the handle.
This was the bat that belonged to Satoko's brother, Satoshi.
He was the victim of last year's tragedy.
You and I, we're the same.
I won't let another tragedy take place!
I'll treat this as a gift from you, who was waiting in the wings!
Let's rip apart the script of this demonic tragedy together!!@k Let's go, Satoshi!!!
As I tried to run up the stairs, I heard a loud noise coming from the hallway by the teacher's office.
I saw Rika-chan rolling on the floor.
......Damn... Rika-chan!!@k You held out as long as you could!!
``......Damn it.@k@vS09/05/170500267. If my body were five years older...``
``You're next, Keiichi-kun!!!@k@|@y@vS09/02/170201651. Whooooaaaaaa!!!``
``Shit!! I have to go.@k@vS09/01/170101369. I have to get to the rooftop!!``
``Ahahahahahahaha, how did you figure it out, how did you?!!@k@|@y@vS09/02/170201653. Still, I won't let you get up there!!!``
Rena's face looked unbelievably scary!
She was ready to rip me apart if she caught me.@k In that case, just try me!!
I jumped up the stairs, skipping every other step!
I turned on the bug in my pocket.@k I didn't have time to put in the earphones!
As Rena flew up the stairs,@k her foot got caught on a jump rope.
She tripped, and then three buckets fell on her head.
...The result of Satoko's trap!!
``Ow... ow ow ow ow...!!
Tch... Ahahahahahahahahaha, it was Satoko-chan, huh?!!``
Satoko leaned against the wall and waved her index finger in a mocking gesture.
``Oh ho ho ho!
You were pretty good, but you are about three hundred million light years too early to go up against a trap expert like me!!!``
``...Satoko-chan, light years are a unit of distance, not time...``
Smash!
The fourth bucket hit Satoko on the head.
I continued up to the rooftop!!
Rena ignored Satoko and ran after me...!

``O, O!@k@vS09/01/170101371. Ooishi-san?@k@vS09/01/170101372. I did it!!!@k@vS09/01/170101373. I got the lighter.@k@vS09/01/170101374. I know where the time bomb is; it's on the rooftop in the drain canal!!@k@vS09/01/170101375. I'm headed up there right now!!``
``...Ooishi-san... is that it?``
Ooishi grabbed the pair of binoculars from Kumagai and looked at the rain gutter on the rooftop.
......There was something like an alarm clock sitting there!
The cord from the clock was extending into the second floor window.
It was so obvious, but they didn't even notice until just then!
Satoko was working hard to remove her classmates' restraints.
But she couldn't do anything about the bike lock on Mion's neck!
``Just run, everyone! Forget about me...!``
``Hmm, that doesn't sound like Mion-san.@k@vS09/04/170400198. Why not act like our club president, even in a situation like this?
All you have to do, as our president, is to give me an order to undo this lock, okay?``
Satoko reached for the back of her collar... and produced a bent hair pin.
Satoko opened the window, climbed onto the windowsill, and faced the bike lock that was restraining Mion.
``E-Everyone, open the curtains and the windows, then run!!``
``B-But, class prez!@k@vS09/24/172400018. What about Maebara-san?``
``The police will help Kei-chan!@k@vS09/03/170300707. You all need to run as soon as possible!!@k@vS09/03/170300708. ...Huh?@k@vS09/03/170300709. Did you unlock it already?``
``To me, this type of lock is child's play!``
The binoculars were trained on the classroom.
All the curtains were open, as well as all the windows. The children, in turn were all running out onto the schoolyard!
Ooishi pushed Ootaka aside, then grabbed his radio and yelled into it.
``All units, go!!@k@vS09/11/170700582. Go, go!!@k@vS09/11/170700583. Secure the hostages!!@k@vS09/11/170700584. The suspect is going up to the second floor, running after one of them!``
``Hey! What are you doing? Ooishi-kun, give me back the radio... Gyahh! Ah... guhhhhh.``
Ootaka tried to grab the radio from Ooishi, but Kumagai stepped in.
There was a dull noise and Ootaka crumbled to the floor, convulsing.
``Oops, sorry.@k@vS09/19/173100183. I guess my knee happened to hit your balls.``

``The classroom is still filled with gasoline, be very careful!@k@vS09/11/170700586. You are forbidden from using any gas bombs or flares. Again, do not use gas bombs or flares!!@k@vS09/11/170700587. The whole place will blow!!``
``Support unit to HQ!@k@vS09/00/poliA17008. We secured twenty-four hostages!!@k@vS09/00/poliA17009. One is injured!``
``This is the assault unit. We're trying to take control of the first floor.@k@vS09/00/poliB17002. ...We've got a problem.@k@vS09/00/poliB17003. The electrical room is locked, and we can't get in.``
``You can't get in?!@k@vS09/11/170700589. Can't you break down the door?``

``It's located directly opposite the classroom.@k@vS09/00/poliB17005. The smell of gasoline is strong here. We might ignite the gas when breaking down the door.@k@vS09/00/poliB17006. We'll await further orders.``
``Shit!!@k@vS09/11/170700591. We could have just turned the power off!@k@vS09/11/170700592. ...Forget the electrical room, go secure the second floor!!``
``Assault unit, roger that. Alpha, GO! GO! GO!!!``
``Ootaka-kun!@k@vS09/11/170700594. What were you going to do if you failed to secure the electrical room?``
``That is... That's what the special unit was for...``
``This is the problem with rich boys...@k@vS09/11/170700596. We'll just have to secure the clock's outlet now!``
``Sniper unit to HQ.@k@vS09/00/poliD17002. I can see a male hostage on the rooftop of the first floor.``
``Ooishi-san!!@k@vS09/19/173100185. That's Maebara-kun!!``
``Give me the speaker!!@k@vS09/11/170700598. Maebara-san!!!@k@vS09/11/170700599. The clock is plugged into the back room on the second floor!!``
I shook my head repeatedly.
I couldn't do that.
Rena was coming after me, so I couldn't head that way.
What else could I do?
The only way was to go up to the roof of the second floor and get the clock from there!!
``Maebara-saaaan!!@k@vS09/11/170700601. Continue up to the roof of the second floor!!!@k@vS09/11/170700602. I'll direct you from there!!``
Ooishi-san was telling me to go further up.
Satoko only told me that it was on the rooftop of the second floor, and she didn't tell me where exactly.
She only said it was in the drain canal.
But maybe Ooishi-san found it with his binoculars.
I put my foot on the railing of the veranda and ran up to the rooftop.
I had never felt so light.
I could feel like I could lift myself with just two or three fingers.
``That's it, keep going!!!@k@vS09/11/170700604. It's at the furthest end of the drain pipe!!!@k@vS09/11/170700605. You only have thirty seconds!!!``
Heh!@k Thirty seconds would be plenty of time!!@k I could get there in half that!!
Over there... Was that it?@k It waaaaaaas!!!
``Sniper unit to HQ.@k@vS09/00/poliD17004. I can see the suspect on the rooftop of the first floor!``
``Ahh, I wish you could fire, but you're using live ammo, aren't you?@k@vS09/11/170700607. It's not tear gas or anything, is it?``
``No, it's live ammunition.``

``Use those in the military! Japanese police don't need anything like that...!@k@vS09/11/170700609. Maebara-san!!@k@vS09/11/170700610. She's after you!!@k@vS09/11/170700611. Hurry!!@k@vS09/11/170700612. She'll be there soon!!!``
How many more seconds did I have?@k Ah, who cares? Whooaaahhhhh!!!
I slid down the roof and grabbed the kitchen timer that was sitting on the drain pipe, which was filled with gasoline.
There was a cord with a copper wire attached to it.
This was supposed to create sparks and start an explosion!
The hands on the clock kept moving, with the second hand trying to reach the minute hand...
Seven,@w60. six,@w60. five,@w60. four,@w60. three,
Whoooaaaaaoooooooohhh!!!!
I threw it to the ground!!
A moment later, I heard the noise of something breaking.
Hah... hah... hah!!@k Did I do it?
``Assault unit to HQ, the time bomb has been stopped!``
``Yeeeeeeeees!!!``
``O-Ooishi-san, we did it, we did it!!``
``Yeah!@k@vS09/11/170700615. M-Maebara-san, good job!!``
``Keiichi-san certainly made me nervous.@k@vS09/04/170400202. Cutting it so close isn't elegant, you know!``
Not only policemen, but the children who were on their way to ambulances raised their voices in cheer.
``Ooishi-san, there's a message from the fire department.@k@vS09/19/173100188. The scene is still dangerous, so order all units to retreat immediately!!``
``Isn't the time bomb gone, though...?``
``Although the ignition device is gone, it's still extremely dangerous.@k@vS09/19/173100190. The lives of the assault unit might be at stake.``
``Damn...!
What about Maebara-kun up there?
Can he jump off?``
``Ooishi-san, according to the map, there's a flower bed by the school building.@k@vS09/19/173100192. We'll tell him to jump there!!``
``Ooishi to all units!!@k@vS09/11/170700621. Stop the operation, fall back immediately, fall back!!``
``Alpha here, roger that.``
``Beta here, roger that. Fall back, fall back!!``
